benefits.description: Lost 42 lbs over the last year (not all on Reta); Reta made keeping off initial loss easy, and took off another 15 lbs this year; heading towards 12% body fat
Cut has been really easy, not the grinding exhaustion from before

side_effects.description: Itchy and slightly more sensitive skin for a period, but it passed

protocol_notes: On Reta since April (approximately April 2025). On 8mg/week split into two doses. Side effects subsided after some time; body and mind felt evened out in the last 2-3 months (approximately 9-10 months into use).
